name: @irisrun/provider-anthropic
description: Vendor-neutral, replay-safe model adapter — the Anthropic model_call performer behind Iris's portable model port; swap providers without touching the agent, and the captured reply replays byte-identically from the journal. Direct Anthropic Messages over built-in fetch (zero deps). Real adapter runs only with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; tests use a fake fetch / fake model.
